data.title: Bybit launches BYUSDT for yield-earning collateral; world's 2nd largest crypto exchange; campaign live.
data.description: A new campaign titled "BYUSDT: Turn Your Easy Earn Assets Into Trading Power" has been launched by Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume. This initiative introduces a tokenized asset for retail users, aimed at enhancing their trading capabilities. The campaign is currently active and accessible to customers.

data.title: Keller Trucking named a 2026 Best Fleets to Drive For® honoree for the ninth year in a row.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 28, 2026, in Defiance, Ohio, it was revealed that Keller Trucking, a part of Thomas E. Keller Trucking Inc., has been recognized as one of the Best Fleets to Drive For® in 2026 by CarriersEdge. This prestigious honor has been awarded to Keller Trucking for the ninth year in a row. The company's consistent performance in this regard showcases its commitment to providing quality services for drivers and maintaining high standards within the industry.

data.title: JCDecaux renews exclusive ad contract for stations in Luxembourg with 100% digital offering.
data.description: JCDecaux has secured the renewal of its exclusive advertising contract for stations throughout the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg. The contract includes a significant upgrade to a fully digital advertising platform, offering advertisers the opportunity to reach a larger audience in high-traffic locations. This renewal solidifies JCDecaux's position as a key player in the advertising market in Luxembourg.

data.title: Dow rises ahead of Fed decision & Powell's comments. Seagate stock soars. Tesla earnings due.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw an increase leading up to the upcoming Federal Reserve decisions and comments from Powell. Tesla is expected to release its earnings report later in the day. The market fluctuated as investors awaited updates from the Fed and Powell. Seagate also experienced a significant increase in its stock value. Live coverage of the ongoing market trends can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Knights of Columbus in Ontario donates record-breaking 20,736 coats to kids in need. Over 450 councils across the province contributed.
data.description: In Hamilton, Ontario, the Knights of Columbus set a new record by donating 20,736 new winter coats to children in need through their Knights of Columbus Coats for Kids® program. This surpasses their initial target and was made possible through the efforts of their members and insurance agents who gathered funds at various events across the province. Over 450 councils contributed to this successful initiative, highlighting the organization's commitment to supporting children and veterans.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Bolton, ON, Canada develops PHONE SAFE lockbox for cell phones to prevent theft or misuse.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 28, 2026, a creator from Bolton, Ontario, Canada shared the inspiration behind creating PHONE SAFE. This innovative accessory aims to protect users from theft or unauthorized use of their cell phones. The inventor expressed the intent to enhance security and offer peace of mind.

data.title: GitHub's Innovation Graph reaches two-year mark with latest developer insights. Q3 2025 data shows global open source trends acknowledged by Federal Reserve and The Economist.
data.description: GitHub has recently unveiled the Q3 2025 Innovation Graph data, which showcases prominent global open source trends. This data has garnered attention from Federal Reserve researchers and The Economist.

data.title: CRV may reach $0.40-$0.46 by Feb 2026 with potential 14-31% increase in 2-4 weeks, facing resistance at $0.37.
data.description: Predictions for the price of CRV indicate a potential increase of 14-31% in the next 2-4 weeks, with a projected range of $0.40 to $0.46. Despite facing oversold conditions, Curve may encounter resistance at $0.37 in the near term.

data.title: Bitcoin stays below $90K as gold reaches record $5.3K amid FOMC, while USD weakens.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin recently failed to break above $90,000, despite a strong performance by gold reaching new highs and a significant drop in the value of the US dollar.

data.title: Toll Brothers opens Regency 55+ active-adult community in Pearl River, New York with carriage-style townhomes and amenities.
data.description: A recently unveiled upscale neighborhood offers carriage-style townhomes and a range of onsite amenities tailored for active-adults. The community showcases modern living spaces crafted with elegant designs to cater to individuals seeking a vibrant lifestyle. With a focus on comfort and convenience, the development boasts a collection of residences built to accommodate the unique needs of residents aged 55 and above. The amenities include pools, fitness centers, social spaces, and walking paths. Featuring a total of [Number of townhomes] townhomes, this exceptional community provides a sophisticated living experience for discerning individuals in search of a dynamic adult-oriented environment.

data.title: Princeton Battlefield Society & Foundation Academies of Trenton to release findings of research on Black soldiers in Battle of Princeton. 152 words.
data.description: Princeton Battlefield Society (PBS) based in Princeton, New Jersey, revealed today a collaboration with Foundation Academies of Trenton (FA) to unveil the findings of FA's noteworthy study on Black soldiers who participated in the Battle for Princeton. This initiative is part of PBS' "Men Without Shoes" Project, commenced in 2025 to commemorate the overlooked common soldiers of the battle. The research sheds light on the historical contributions of these soldiers, aiming to honor their legacy. The project is tied to the upcoming 250th anniversary of New Jersey's establishment in the United States.

data.title: Global entries sought for Globee® Awards for AI recognizing workplace and business achievements worldwide. Organizing globally recognized awards to honor AI-driven achievements across individuals, teams, organizations, and innovations in products, services, and creative excellence. Located in Silicon Valley, the awards call for entries from all over the world.
data.description: Recognizing outstanding accomplishments in the field of artificial intelligence from individuals, teams, organizations, and innovative products and services worldwide, the prestigious Globee® Awards ceremony took place in Silicon Valley, California on January 28, 2026. The event celebrated excellence in AI, honoring recipients across various categories. This widely acclaimed event attracted participants and nominees from all corners of the globe, highlighting the remarkable contributions in the realm of technology.

data.title: Accountable Health Partners and Pearl Health team up in 2026 to boost value-based care in NY, affiliated with URMC.
data.description: In Rochester, New York, on January 28, 2026, Accountable Health Partners (AHP) and Pearl Health unveiled a collaboration aimed at propelling value-based care efforts for the year. AHP, linked with the University of Rochester Medical Center, is a clinically integrated network.
